_comment: Filled in during Phase 0 bench verification (see mirror_bridge.py docstring). Do not guess these values -- run probe_joint_sign.py (sim) against safe_probe.py (real) per joint, and the gripper ramp check, before trusting this file.

sign._comment: 1 if a positive delta in Isaac Sim moves this joint the same physical direction as a positive delta sent to the real motor; -1 if opposite. Determine per-joint with safe_probe.py --side left --joint N --step 0.05 against probe_joint_sign.py.

offset_rad._comment: Optional small residual trim in radians, added after the sign flip. Leave at 0.0 if zero-calibration (openarm-can-set-zero) was done properly -- this is not a substitute for real zeroing.

gripper._comment: Raw LJ8.pos motor value at fully-open and fully-closed, from ramping LJ8.pos with safe_probe.py --side left --joint 8.
